reviews.comment:
Voy al local para hacer un trámite y el servicio del ACA para los clientes y no clientes todo junto . Los números se confunden . El local está lleno de personas y las personas se cansan y se van . Hay una sola empleada atendiendo que le pone onda pero el servicio del ACA va de mal en peor
Un desastre ......

(Translated by Google)
I go to the office to complete a procedure and the ACA service for both customers and non-customers. The numbers get mixed up. The office is packed, and people get tired and leave. There's only one employee working, and she's trying hard, but the ACA service is going from bad to worse. A disaster...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzdHRDTENBEAE

reviews.comment:
Fui a hacer el registro internacional.  Nadie, tardé 15 minutos.  Un placer. Muy buena atención y lugar para estacionar.

(Translated by Google)
I went to get my international registration. No one was there, it only took 15 minutes. A pleasure. Excellent service and parking available.

reviews.comment:
El personal muy cordial. Una vergüenza que hace meses tengan el carteli de sólo efectivo por problemas de conexión.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very friendly. It's a shame they've had the "cash only" sign up for months due to connection problems.
